signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving Price Above $2,288 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving Price Above $2,288 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with a 7% ETH price climb to nearly $2,400 as institutional demand returns.[1] Bitmine Immersion Technologies confirmed its largest
